title: crinum × ceciliae
intro: Crinum × ceciliae, also known as the 'Summer Sunset' or 'Golden Lilyturf', is a hybrid plant species within the Amaryllidaceae family, derived from the cross between Crinum moorei and Crinum x powellii. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Crinum × ceciliae include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may aid in reducing the risk of certain diseases. The plant is often prepared in herbal forms, such as infusions or tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its applications and optimal usage.
